original_statement: "The KNVB has made reaching the semi-finals a minimum target; [Netherlands national team coach Ronald] Koeman wants to go even further and win the [2026 FIFA World Cup] tournament."
statement_context: Excerpt from team guide/preview published by The Guardian on or around 2026-06-03. Author Marcel van der Kraan.

source_text_snippet: The KNVB has made reaching the semi-finals a minimum target; Koeman wants to go even further and win the tournament. But that will require a lot of hard work.
